fields.description:
Subcluster: Service blueprint
Notes: Foundation for all other service design work

fields.name: Identify pain points and drop-off moments in audience journey
fields.description: Subcluster: Service blueprint

fields.name: Design target-state audience journey with entry/exit criteria per stage
fields.description: Subcluster: Service blueprint

fields.name: Define audience lifecycle stages (anonymous > casual > regular > loyal > advocate)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Loyalty ladder
Notes: Drives segmentation and retention strategy

fields.name: Map content and engagement tactics to each lifecycle stage
fields.description: Subcluster: Loyalty ladder

fields.name: Document what the audience gets at each engagement level (free vs registered vs paying)
fields.description: Subcluster: Value exchange

fields.name: Design and deploy at least one audience feedback mechanism

Subcluster: Value exchange
Notes: Surveys, comment analysis, direct outreach

fields.name: Schedule and run monthly audience insight review with editorial leads
fields.description:
Subcluster: Feedback loops
Notes: Monthly or per-cycle review of audience signals

fields.name: Map audience information needs to content areas using survey + analytics data
fields.description: Subcluster: Needs mapping

fields.name: Produce a gap analysis: content output vs audience needs
fields.description: Subcluster: Needs mapping

fields.name: Set up weekly monitoring of search trends, social mentions, and comment themes
fields.description:
Subcluster: Continuous listening
Notes: Audience understanding as practice, not one-off

fields.name: Run quarterly audience insight refresh and distribute findings to editorial
fields.description: Subcluster: Continuous listening

fields.name: Map competing information sources for each target audience segment
fields.description: Subcluster: Competitive landscape

fields.name: Define leading indicators of audience need shifts (search volume, topic trends)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Audience signals
Notes: Especially for volatile/exile contexts

fields.name: Build a signal-to-action workflow: when indicator X fires, editorial does Y
fields.description: Subcluster: Audience signals

fields.name: Run community listening across WhatsApp groups, comments, and social
fields.description:
Subcluster: Research methods
Notes: High-value but time-intensive; for outlets with active community channels

fields.description:
Subcluster: Research methods
Notes: Template survey for cohort use

fields.description:
Subcluster: Research methods
Notes: Overlap: Analytics owns the tooling; Audience Dev owns the interpretation

fields.name: Conduct at least 5 user interviews or 1 focus group per persona
fields.description:
Subcluster: Research methods
Notes: Too resource-heavy for 4-month cohort; recommend as post-program activity

fields.name: Facilitate persona creation workshop with editorial and audience teams
fields.description:
Subcluster: Persona creation
Notes: Core JD KPI: Persona Development

fields.name: Test each persona hypothesis against analytics and survey data; revise or discard

Subcluster: Persona validation
Notes: Use analytics to confirm or challenge persona assumptions

fields.name: Map each validated persona to editorial pillars
fields.description: Subcluster: Persona-content mapping

fields.name: Identify content gaps per persona and prioritize top 3 for production
fields.description:
Subcluster: Persona-content mapping
Notes: Bridge between persona work and surface-level content decisions

fields.name: Define engagement tiers (active / lapsed / dormant) with quantitative thresholds
fields.description: Subcluster: Behavioral segments

fields.name: Tag subscribers by content preference or topic interest in ESP
fields.description:
Subcluster: Behavioral segments
Notes: Depends on ESP capability and list size

fields.name: Define audience segments by geography, language, and local context
fields.description:
Subcluster: Geo/language segments
Notes: Critical for multilingual outlets; skip for single-language operations

fields.name: Build behavioral rules in analytics tool distinguishing new visitors from returning readers
fields.description:
Subcluster: New vs returning
Notes: Basic GA/CMS segmentation

fields.name: Produce a segment-to-content matrix: which formats and topics serve which segment

Subcluster: Segment-content strategy
Notes: Depends on having segments defined first

fields.name: Define one conversion goal per audience lifecycle stage
fields.description: Subcluster: Conversion architecture

fields.name: Audit current conversion paths and document gaps
fields.description: Subcluster: Conversion architecture

fields.name: Design calls-to-action matched to content type (article, newsletter, video)
fields.description: Subcluster: Conversion architecture

fields.name: Evaluate registration wall vs open access: run A/B test or produce trade-off analysis
fields.description: Subcluster: Registration strategy

fields.name: Implement registration system
fields.description: Subcluster: Registration strategy

fields.name: Design progressive profiling: collect one data point per interaction
fields.description:
Subcluster: Registration strategy
Notes: Collect audience data gradually without friction

fields.name: Define what 'engaged' means for this outlet with specific metric thresholds
fields.description:
Subcluster: Engagement definition
Notes: Requires stable baseline data first

fields.name: Build engagement score combining frequency, depth, and recency
fields.description:
Subcluster: Engagement scoring
Notes: Valuable but too labor-intensive for cohort model; recommend post-program

fields.name: Identify top 3 behaviors that correlate with long-term retention and design nudges for each
fields.description: Subcluster: Habit formation

fields.name: Build early-warning dashboard for subscriber drop-off using leading indicators
fields.description:
Subcluster: Churn prevention
Notes: Cadence, timing, format consistency — cross-cuts with Surfaces

fields.name: Define retention metrics beyond churn: frequency, depth, recency, lifetime value
fields.description:
Subcluster: Retention measurement
Notes: ESP-dependent; template-able

fields.name: Build retention dashboard with weekly automated reporting
fields.description: Subcluster: Retention measurement

fields.name: Design and deploy win-back email sequence for lapsed subscribers
fields.description: Subcluster: Re-engagement

fields.name: Set inactive subscriber thresholds (e.g., 90 days no open) and automate tagging
fields.description: Subcluster: Re-engagement

fields.name: Create or strengthen at least one audience community space
fields.description: Subcluster: Community building

fields.name: Define community purpose, scope, and governance model
fields.description: Subcluster: Community design

fields.name: Select community platform matched to audience behavior (WhatsApp, Discord, forum)
fields.description: Subcluster: Community design

fields.name: Write moderation guidelines and escalation paths
fields.description: Subcluster: Community design

fields.name: Build editorial-to-community content bridge (e.g., discussion prompts from articles)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Community engagement
Notes: How editorial output feeds community discussion

fields.name: Design member spotlight or contribution pathway (user-generated content, tips)
fields.description: Subcluster: Community engagement

fields.name: Define community health metrics and set up monthly tracking
fields.description: Subcluster: Community health

fields.name: Design at least 2 event formats matched to different audience segments
fields.description: Subcluster: Events strategy

fields.name: Build event-to-content pipeline: live event > recording > archive > distribution
fields.description: Subcluster: Events strategy

fields.name: Design hybrid (online + offline) event model with cost estimate
fields.description: Subcluster: Events strategy

fields.name: Create event production checklist (reusable template)
fields.description: Subcluster: Events operations

fields.name: Design post-event audience capture workflow (signup, feedback form, follow-up email)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Events operations
Notes: Convert event attendees to regular audience

fields.name: Build event feedback loop: insights from events feed back to editorial calendar
fields.description: Subcluster: Events operations

fields.name: Audit where new audience actually comes from (analytics attribution report)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Acquisition channels
Notes: Overlap: Distribution owns channel ops; Audience Dev owns the strategic framing

fields.name: Identify 3-5 peer outlets for content exchange or audience sharing pilots
fields.description:
Subcluster: Peer cross-promotion
Notes: Leverage SSH network

fields.name: Set growth targets per channel with monthly milestones
fields.description:
Subcluster: Growth targets
Notes: Baseline expectation: outlet can state a growth target with rationale

fields.name: Evaluate top 2 paid channels: estimate cost-per-acquisition and run test campaign
fields.description:
Subcluster: Paid acquisition
Notes: Out of scope: most outlets lack budget; unsustainable without ongoing spend

fields.name: Design referral mechanic with tracking and incentive (e.g., refer 3 friends = X)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Referral programs
Notes: Audience Dev frames the strategy; Distribution executes

fields.name: Audit opt-in status for every subscriber list
fields.description:
Subcluster: Consent & privacy
Notes: Non-negotiable for any ESP migration or list import

fields.name: Complete GDPR / local data protection mapping for all audience data stores
fields.description:
Subcluster: Consent & privacy
Notes: Requires legal expertise beyond Audience Desk scope; flag to SSH ops

fields.name: Run cross-platform dedup (newsletter + CMS + social subscriber lists)
fields.description:
Subcluster: List hygiene
Notes: First task for any outlet with an existing list

fields.name: Merge duplicate subscriber records within ESP
fields.description: Subcluster: List hygiene

fields.name: Set up monthly bounce handling and list cleaning schedule
fields.description:
Subcluster: List hygiene
Notes: Manual for small lists; automate later via AI/enrichment APIs

fields.name: Define inactive subscriber threshold and build automated suppression rule
fields.description: Subcluster: List hygiene

fields.name: Evaluate and select a data enrichment tool; run pilot on one segment
fields.description:
Subcluster: Contact enrichment
Notes: Re-engagement sequence before purge

fields.name: Separate organizational subscriptions from individual reader accounts in ESP
fields.description:
Subcluster: Org vs personal split
Notes: Relevant for outlets with institutional subscribers; skip for consumer-only lists

fields.name: Audit content accessibility: screen readers, alt text, color contrast
fields.description:
Subcluster: Content accessibility
Notes: Not first-cohort but architectural decisions matter now

fields.name: Publish accessibility standards for content production team
fields.description: Subcluster: Content accessibility

fields.name: Evaluate translation/localization needs for top 3 audience segments
fields.description: Subcluster: Language access

fields.name: Audit current revenue sources and map audience dependency for each
fields.description: Subcluster: Revenue readiness

fields.name: Map audience segments to potential revenue models (subscription, membership, donations)
fields.description: Subcluster: Revenue readiness

fields.name: Verify data architecture can support future monetization (payment, paywall, CRM)
fields.description: Subcluster: Revenue readiness

fields.name: Track watch time per video format
fields.description: Subcluster: Video engagement

fields.name: Identify drop-off points in videos
fields.description: Subcluster: Video retention

fields.name: Add clear subscribe CTAs in videos
fields.description: Subcluster: Video conversion

fields.name: Respond to video comments systematically
fields.description: Subcluster: Video community

fields.name: Adapt videos to multiple formats (short/long)
fields.description: Subcluster: Video distribution

fields.name: Identify returning viewers vs new viewers
fields.description: Subcluster: Video loyalty

fields.name: Baseline the comment system — platform health, moderation tooling, and spam filtering
fields.description:
Subcluster: Community & Engagement Assessment
Notes: Coral by Vox Media (open-source); Disqus; native CMS; AI-assisted moderation essential; community guidelines enforcement

fields.name: Evaluate community platform fit and live event capability
fields.description:
Subcluster: Community & Engagement Assessment
Notes: Discord, Circle, Mighty Networks; engagement metrics beyond pageviews; community-to-CMS integration for editorial intelligence

fields.name: Comment platform selection & configuration (Coral, Disqus, native CMS)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Comment & Discussion Systems
Notes: SURFACE CROSS-LISTING — lives in 02 Audience Development, shown here for dependency visibility. Comment platform deployment has pub tech plumbing (embed, SSO, webhook handlers) but the ownership + moderation strategy is audience dev. Coral (Vox Media open source) is the gold standard for newsroom-aligned comments; Disqus for lower-lift deployments; native CMS comments for WordPress-minimal cohort members.

fields.name: Moderation tooling, spam filtering & community guidelines enforcement
fields.description:
Subcluster: Comment & Discussion Systems
Notes: SURFACE CROSS-LISTING — lives in 02 Audience Development. Moderation policy design and community guidelines authoring are audience dev concerns; pub tech supports the tooling layer (Perspective API, Akismet, platform-native moderation queues). Anchors to cluster 08 Trust & Provenance for editorial transparency on moderation decisions.

fields.name: Member identity connection to analytics and revenue systems
fields.description:
Subcluster: Membership Community Platforms
Notes: SURFACE CROSS-LISTING — lives in 02 Audience Development. Member identity connection depends on cluster 05 r100 identity resolution (first-party segments) and cluster 10 Paywall sidecar (entitlement state). Pub tech provides the plumbing (SSO, entitlement APIs, event tagging); audience dev owns the audience model and revenue linkage strategy. Explicit cross-cluster dependency chain: cluster 05 identity → cluster 10 entitlement → community platform identity.

fields.name: Team metrics training — baseline data interpretation capability
fields.description:
Subcluster: Data Literacy & Team Capability
Notes: Programme-level consultation deliverable. Baseline data interpretation exercise: can the team read a dashboard and draw conclusions? Focus on engaged time, not pageviews. Materials are reusable cohort-wide.

fields.name: Data champion development — designate and upskill a data point-person (Bus Factor > 1)
fields.description:
Subcluster: Data Literacy & Team Capability
Notes: Programme-level consultation. Bus Factor > 1 — reduce dependency on a single analyst. Designate and upskill a data point-person per newsroom. Train on GA4 / PostHog / Looker Studio. Per-newsroom context, not template-able.

fields.name: Audience segmentation — behavioural, demographic, engagement-based
fields.description:
Subcluster: Activation Layer
Notes: Segment-based strategy; frequent readers, social sharers, conversion-ready; Piano benchmarks: 19% registered-to-subscriber conversion (avg); top performers >2.2%

fields.name: Editorial feedback loop — content performance → editorial prioritisation
fields.description:
Subcluster: Activation Layer
Notes: Chartbeat, Ophan (Guardian), STELA (NYT); data-informed not data-driven; content performance → editorial prioritisation; real-time newsroom dashboards
